Now I understand the issue. The error is on line 389:
```java
final SortedMap<MOScope, ManagedObject> reg = server.getRegistry();
```

The `server.getRegistry()` returns `SortedMap<MOScope, ManagedObject<?>>` but the code is trying to assign it to `SortedMap<MOScope, ManagedObject>`.

The fix is to change line 389 from:
```java
final SortedMap<MOScope, ManagedObject> reg = server.getRegistry();
```
to:
```java
final SortedMap<MOScope, ManagedObject<?>> reg = server.getRegistry();
```
